title: HfjONE Music Pack
description: Plays all tracks from the ONE Soundtrack!
body:
This pack replaces music in-game with songs from the internet animated series “ONE”. The series, alongside every song in this pack, were created/covered by [Cheesy Hfj](https://www.youtube.com/@CheesyHfj). All songs can be found in [this playlist](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLibm-rpGR0iB2_79z7WKKpAvOjY8o8m2S&si=1G9Z9McDcFOXU20t). The intro theme was ripped (and extended) from a random episode. This pack replaces the vanilla music patterns (biome exclusive songs and whatnot). This pack also replaces all music discs.
Main Menu - Intro * 2
- Spow
- Three Year Shmee
- Donor Live
- Whiskey Lounge
- Wennicher

- Spow * 3
- Three Year Shmee

- (All Overworld music)
